validations.rationale: spec_change_log.md:24 no 3 shihyo ijou ga None ni naru senryaku nomi eikyo wo ukeru toiu kijutsu ga suugakuteki ni ayamari de aru koto wo jisshou. FLOOR=0.90 no eikyo wa n_invalid=2 de mo hassei suru. suugakuteki kenshou: WFA(weight=0.10)+Drift(weight=0.08) ga None no baai valid_weight=0.82 < 0.90 de clamp hatsudo. OOS_IS(weight=0.12) tanden None de mo valid_weight=0.88 < 0.90 de clamp hatsudo. jissoku flip 8 ken subete ga n_invalid=2 de aru koto ga kore wo jisshou (flip_breakdown_by_indicator_none_count={2:8, 3:0, 4:0}). kono kijutsu ayamari ga shourai no [change:spec] handan ni chokusetsu eikyo suru tame medium eto upgrade.

OOS_IS(0.12) tanden=valid_weight 0.88 < 0.90.
validations.additional_note: FLOOR=0.90 ga eikyo suru seikakuna joken wa yuukou omomi no goukei ga 0.90 miman ni naru indicator None no kumiaase de ari saishou wa weight 0.11 ijou no 1 shihyo None de eikyo ga shoujiru. spec_change_log no teisei wa gijutsuteki seikakusei to shourai no seisaku handan no tameni yusendo takaku jisshi subeki.

key_findings: CSR-402 downgraded high->medium: quant-analyst jissoku de flip 8 ken no Live zaisen 0 ken, sekkei hyoteki 4-None pattern 0 ken wo kakunin. giyo Live konyuu toiu high severity konkyo ga shosshitsu. backfill mijisshi to schema konzai wa medium soto toshite keizoku taiso wo yousuru.

QA-403 upgraded low->medium: spec_change_log no 3 shihyo ijou None nomi eikyo toiu kijutsu ga suugakuteki ni ayamari. flip 8 ken subete ga n_invalid=2 de FLOOR=0.90 wa n_invalid=1 de mo eikyo shiuru koto wo suushiki de jisshou (OOS_IS weight=0.12 tanden de mo valid_weight=0.88 < 0.90). shourai no [change:spec] seisaku handan wo yugameru risk ga aru tame medium ni upgrade.

QA-402 validated medium: test_qa301_soft_score_floor.py ni check_backtest_gate E2E fuzai wo kakunin. test_v5_5_0_metrics.py no ichibu E2E (schema version nomi) wa 4-None FAIL scenario wo kenshou shite inai. CLAUDE.md no hissu golden youken wo mitasanai.

CSR-404 validated medium: context command kara context_builder->get_parquet_path no keiro de barideeshon mijiteiyou wo kakunin. DATA_DIR ga CWD sotai no tame rironteiki path traversal ga kano (file sonzai joho reeku dome daga medium datou).
post_fix_defect goukei 8 ken (CSR: 5/6, QA: 4/8) ga 05ae8595/15d62e62 commit kiin matawa backfill mijisshi ni kanren suru shin mondai toshite kakunin.
